流程係先 30-min interview 然後 1-hr written test

interview 冇咩特別
都係自介，然後出條題目比你討論同埋講下你既個人強弱項
至於Written Test 就 10 條MC 加1 條 Long Q
MC 有2,3 條係Calculus (e.g Extremum, Derivative, Integral)
2,3 條 Linear Algebra
然後其餘都係 STAT 野 (e.g Conditional Prob, MLE, t-distribution, joint distribution ...)
Long Q 係要你寫 Programming script 去整一個 recursive function.
